# Mindful QALB — AI Content Summary
# https://www.mindfulqalb.com/llms.txt

> Mindful QALB is an online mental health practice run by Aqsa Khatib,
> a licensed Counseling Psychologist (Master's in Counseling Psychology,
> CBT certified, NLP Practitioner, EFT & TFT Tapping, Trauma-Informed Care,
> Psycho-oncology, 3,000+ clinical hours). Services include individual therapy,
> couples therapy, and mental health support groups. Based in Karnataka, India.
> Clients served worldwide including NRIs. Languages: English, Urdu.

## Services
- Individual therapy: Chat ₹499 / Audio ₹899 / Video ₹1,299 per session
- Couples therapy: Video 90 min ₹1,999
- Free 15-minute initial consultation

## Key Modalities
CBT (Cognitive Behavioural Therapy), ACT (Acceptance & Commitment Therapy),
Gestalt Therapy, Solution-Focused Therapy, NLP, EFT, TFT Tapping,
Trauma-Informed Care, Psycho-oncology, Family & Couple Therapy

## Conditions Treated
Anxiety, depression, OCD, ADHD, PTSD, burnout, grief, relationship difficulties,
self-esteem issues, life transitions, career stress, couples conflict

## Credentials
- Master's in Counseling Psychology
- CBT Certification
- NLP Practitioner
- EFT & TFT Tapping
- Trauma-Informed Care
- Psycho-oncology training
- Featured in Inquilab Newspaper
- International webinar presenter (Berlin University)
- Published author on VHealthy platform

## Contact
mindfulqalb@gmail.com
https://www.mindfulqalb.com/contact

## Crisis Resources (India)
iCall: 9152987821
Vandrevala Foundation: 1860-2662-345 (24/7)

## Blog Articles
Articles written by Aqsa Khatib on mental health and emotional wellness:

- How Family Dynamics, Generational Trauma, and Couple Therapy Shape Our Emotional Lives
  https://www.mindfulqalb.com/blog/family-dynamics-generational-trauma-couple-therapy
  Topics: family therapy, generational trauma, attachment styles, couple therapy

- What Are You Feeling Right Now? A Gentle Guide to Understanding and Managing Emotions
  https://www.mindfulqalb.com/blog/understanding-managing-emotions-guide
  Topics: emotional regulation, grounding techniques, anxiety management, mindfulness

- Understanding Your Emotions: Simple, Practical Ways to Feel Better
  https://www.mindfulqalb.com/blog/understanding-emotions-practical-ways-to-feel-better
  Topics: coping strategies, anxiety, depression, overthinking, self-care

- Grief in Layers: Understanding Loss, Healing, and Emotional Resilience
  https://www.mindfulqalb.com/blog/grief-in-layers-understanding-loss-healing-resilience
  Topics: grief therapy, coping with loss, stages of grief, complex grief, resilience
